description: Queue state for batching full-split snapshot publication without blocking on corrupt snapshots.

notes.published-clean: Published snapshots with no table-level `partial` status in the local export reports as of 2026-07-01.
notes.published-partial: Published snapshots with at least one table-level `partial` status in the local export reports as of 2026-07-01. Keep these out of the clean backfill lane unless explicitly requeued.
notes.corrupt: Snapshots that fail clean-lane export should move here immediately so later clean batches can continue without waiting.
